BagM Beih. 02, 062 [Šumma Izbu 08][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] x [...]

(flake 1') [...] ... [...]

flake 2'2'

[...] ⸢E₂?.GAL?⸣ UŠ ⸢KA?⸣ [...]

(flake 2') [...] the palace will appropriate [...]; [...].

flake 3'3'

[...] ⸢ša₂⸣ 15 UGU ša₂ 2.30 U₅ [...] x [...]

(flake 3') [...] the right [...] is superimposed on the left [...] ... [...].

flake 4'4'

[...] ⸢LUGAL AŠ.TE⸣ AD-šu₂ DABbat E₂.[GAL] NUN BIRaḫ

(flake 4') [...] the king will seize his father's throne; the prince's palace will be scattered.

flake 5'5'

[...] ⸢GUB₃⸣ UGU <ša₂> ZA₃ U₅-ma 4? GIR₃-ME-šu₂

(flake 5') [... of] the left [...] is superimposed on (the one) of the right and his 4 feet [...] ... will seize the throne.

flake 6'6'

[...] x AŠ.TE DABbat

flake 7'7'

[...] ⸢DUMU⸣ LUGAL AŠ.TE DABbat

(flake 7') [...] the king's son will seize the throne.

flake 8'8'

[...] x DUMU LUGAL DUMU-ME-šu AŠ.⸢TE⸣ DABbat

(flake 8') [...] as for the king's son, his sons will seize the throne.

flake 9'9'

[...] x [...] LUGAL ia-a-bi-šu₂ ŠU-su KUR⸢ad₂?⸣

(flake 9') [...] his affair [...] the king (lit. his hand) will conquer his enemies.

flake 10'10'

[...] AN? [...] x INIM-su AŠ.TE [...]

(flake 10') [...] ... his affair [...] the throne [...]

flake 11'11'

[...] ⸢SAG⸣.DU-⸢su⸣ x [x x (x)] DUMU DUMU.MUNUS AŠ.TE [...]

(flake 11') [...] its head ... [...] a young girl's son will [...] the throne.

flake 12'12'

[...] ⸢SAG.DU⸣-su bu-di-šu₂ IGI LUGAL DUMU-ME?-šu₂ x [...]

(flake 12') [...] its head faces its shoulder: as for the king, his sons ... [...].

flake 13'13'

[...] KUN-su ne₂-kel-mu LUGAL ⸢DUMU⸣-[šu₂ ...]

(flake 13') [...] is frowning at its tail: as for the king, his son [...].

flake 14'14'

[...] ⸢ŠA₃?⸣-ME E₃ lum-nu GAL₂ [...]

(flake 14') [...] the intestines emerge: there will be evil [...].

flake 15'15'

[...] x AD? ŠU MIN? NUN KUR DAB? [...]

(flake 15') [...] ... the prince will seize the land [...].

flake 16'16'

[...] ⸢PA? GAL?⸣ [...]

(flake 16') [...] ... [...]

flake 17'17'

[...] MURGU-ME-šu₂ [...]

(flake 17') [...] its shoulders.

(end surface missing)
